info.title: Aurora eCommerce API
info.description:
Production-grade eCommerce API.

- Auth: JWT access (15 min) + opaque refresh (30 days), rotated, family-revocation on theft
- Persistence: MySQL via Prisma
- Validation: Zod on every body/query/param
- Idempotency: order creation supports `Idempotency-Key` header

post.summary: Clear cookies and revoke the refresh token
Add an item to the cart

patch.summary: Set the quantity of a cart item

delete.summary: Remove an item from the cart

post.summary: Place an order (atomic: charge + persist + decrement stock)

schema.description: Replay-safe key — same input + key returns the original order

parameters.description: Replay-safe key — same input + key returns the original order
parameters.name: idempotency-key

get.summary: Fetch a single order by id
